description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly dark gray upper with black overlays and a striking red Nike Swoosh logo on both sides. The shoe has a white rubber sole that shows some signs of wear, and the heel is marked with bold red 'NIKE' lettering. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with flat gray laces, and the tongue displays a red Nike logo patch. The materials appear to be a combination of synthetic leather, mesh, and rubber, providing both durability and comfort. The overall design is sporty and urban, suitable for casual wear or light athletic activities.
description: A dark gray and black athletic sneaker with a red Nike Swoosh, white sole, and red branding on the heel. The shoe features standard lacing and a sporty, urban design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red Nike Swoosh, dark gray upper, and white sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the standard criss-cross lacing, rounded toe, and tongue with red Nike logo.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the red Swoosh and visible heel branding.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the bold red 'NIKE' text on the heel and the white sole.
attribute_logo: Red Nike Swoosh on both sides, red 'NIKE' text on heel, red Nike logo patch on tongue
